positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed minimalist illustration of a majestic crescent moon cradling an array of interconnected, bioluminescent flora and fauna. The composition should feature strong vertical and circular elements, forming a mandala-like pattern. Dominant colors are deep sapphire blue, cosmic violet, and glowing neon emerald green, providing high contrast against a deep midnight black background. The style must be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern psychedelic botanical illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Ensure clean silhouettes, uniform ink density, and extreme precision in all lines. Studio lighting, flat vector aesthetic, high contrast, perfect symmetry, centered.
